title: The Good Boy buffs your primary creature

card.rawText: This card only affects your primary creature. Atk: +1. Hit: +1. SPD: +1. AL: +1.

plan.title: The Good Boy buffs your primary creature
plan.summary: Play The Good Boy and verify its printed primary-creature stat suite.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so bonuses come only from The Good Boy.

steps: Read player_1 primary creature effective AL and SPD.
Run a follow-up battle and inspect Hit and Atk output.

expectedAssertions.label: Attack damage includes the +1 Atk bonus
The Good Boy remains in magic slot

manualVerification: Confirm the aura affects only its controller's primary creature.
riskNotes: Covers the positive owner-primary aura case.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate The Good Boy primary stat aura.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
